children.label: A
children.text: the birth or adoption of a child of the member and to care for such child; or

children.label: B
children.text: the placement of a minor child with the member for adoption or long-term foster care.

children.label: iii
children.text: other circumstances that the Secretary determines reasonable and appropriate.

children.label: B
children.text: The regulations prescribed under subparagraph (A) shall require that any leave authorized to be taken after the one-year period described in paragraph (1) shall be taken within a reasonable period of time, as determined by the Secretary of Defense, after cessation of the circumstances warranting the extended deadline.
the selected reserve who is entitled to compensation under ; orsection 206 of title 37

the individual ready reserve who is entitled to compensation under when attending or participating in a sufficient number of periods of inactive-duty training during a year to count the year as a qualifying year of creditable service toward eligibility for retired pay.section 206 of title 37
